title: Genomics
description: The Genomics module integrates genomic data with clinical records to support precision medicine research and molecular tumor board workflows. Researchers can upload and annotate VCF files, explore variant data, and link genomic findings to patient clinical timelines.
tips: Annotate uploaded VCF files against current reference databases to ensure variant classifications reflect the latest clinical evidence.
Link genomic variants to OMOP clinical records to enable combined genotype-phenotype analyses within your cohorts.
Use the Tumor Board view to present integrated genomic and clinical findings in a structured format suitable for multidisciplinary review.
Apply quality filters during VCF upload to exclude low-confidence variant calls before annotation.
Coordinate with your bioinformatics team to standardize VCF preprocessing steps and ensure consistency across submitted samples.
